messages.text: Clinging arcane flame catches on you and keeps burning, gnawing at your flesh.
{name} is set alight with clinging arcane flame.
The clinging arcane flame gnaws deeper into your burning flesh.
The arcane flame gutters out and the burning eases.
The arcane flame clinging to {name} gutters out.
{name} is alight with clinging arcane flame that will not go out.
